description: Usage overview for codex-app-server based on Loki logs — mirroring Claude Code Overview layout with sessions, tokens, performance, and platform breakdowns.

panels.description: Total number of log events in the selected time range.
panels.title: Total requests

panels.description: Total tokens consumed across all types (input + output + cached + reasoning) in the selected time range.

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({service_name="codex-app-server"} | user_email =~ "$member" | model =~ "$model" | input_token_count != "" | unwrap input_token_count [$__auto])) + sum(sum_over_time({service_name="codex-app-server"} | user_email =~ "$member" | model =~ "$model" | output_token_count != "" | unwrap output_token_count [$__auto])) + sum(sum_over_time({service_name="codex-app-server"} | user_email =~ "$member" | model =~ "$model" | cached_token_count != "" | unwrap cached_token_count [$__auto])) + sum(sum_over_time({service_name="codex-app-server"} | user_email =~ "$member" | model =~ "$model" | reasoning_token_count != "" | unwrap reasoning_token_count [$__auto]))

panels.title: Total tokens

panels.description: Number of unique conversation sessions in the selected time range.
panels.title: Conversations

panels.description: Number of unique users in the selected time range.
panels.title: Active users

panels.description: Request rate over time broken down by model.
panels.title: Request rate by model

panels.description: Total API calls broken down by model in the selected time range.
panels.title: Requests by model

panels.description: Average API response latency over time using duration_ms field.
panels.title: API request latency

panels.description: Total API calls per team member in the selected time range.
panels.title: Requests by team member

panels.description: Average API response duration in milliseconds over the selected time range.
panels.title: Avg response duration

panels.description: Request distribution by authentication mode.
panels.title: Auth mode

panels.description: Request distribution by terminal type.
panels.title: Terminal type

panels.description: Request distribution by app version.
panels.title: Codex version

panels.description: Percentage of successful requests (success=true) in the selected time range.
panels.title: Success rate

panels.description: Per-user breakdown of conversations, token usage and efficiency.

targets.expr: topk(50, count by (user_email) (sum by (user_email, conversation_id) (count_over_time({service_name="codex-app-server"} | user_email =~ "$member" | model =~ "$model" [$__auto]))))

topk(50, sum by (user_email) (sum_over_time({service_name="codex-app-server"} | user_email =~ "$member" | model =~ "$model" | input_token_count != "" | unwrap input_token_count [$__auto])) + sum by (user_email) (sum_over_time({service_name="codex-app-server"} | user_email =~ "$member" | model =~ "$model" | output_token_count != "" | unwrap output_token_count [$__auto])))

sum by (user_email) (sum_over_time({service_name="codex-app-server"} | user_email =~ "$member" | model =~ "$model" | input_token_count != "" | unwrap input_token_count [$__auto])) / count by (user_email) (sum by (user_email, conversation_id) (count_over_time({service_name="codex-app-server"} | user_email =~ "$member" | model =~ "$model" [$__auto])))

targets.expr: sum by (model) (sum_over_time({service_name="codex-app-server"} | user_email =~ "$member" | model =~ "$model" | input_token_count != "" | unwrap input_token_count [$__range]))

panels.title: Tokens by model

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (user_email) (sum_over_time({service_name="codex-app-server"} | user_email =~ "$member" | model =~ "$model" | input_token_count != "" | unwrap input_token_count [$__range])))
